Thus we observe that the ancients have not dealt at length on
the question of profession or means of livelihood and the meagre
directions laid in ancient texts to not fulfil the complex needs of present·
day professions.
Benham has written a separate book on palmistry, dealing with
vocations. but here I do not want to drift from the field of astrology to
palmistry.
